title: Humanize PPT Slide Plan
description: Each slide carries Humanize's per-page media decision (image/diagram/video) and a non-binding layout hint. Downstream skills consume this and produce their own native HTML deck or editable PPTX.

media.description: v0.6.7: per-page media decision with machine-actionable fields. Humanize decides what materials the page needs AND where they should land. The downstream media subagent reads asset_path + prompt_hint and produces the file. Without asset_path, the media slot is a label, not a task (v0.6.5 gap).

asset_path.description: v0.6.7: where the downstream media subagent should write the file, e.g. 'assets/s01-hero-gpt-photo.png'. null means 'no asset needed'.

prompt_hint.description: v0.6.7: human-readable prompt for the image model. e.g. 'AI Agent 概念入门 封面图，10 分钟课程'.

asset_path.description: v0.6.7: where the SVG/HTML file should land. e.g. 'assets/s05-context-diagram.svg'.

prompt_hint.description: v0.6.7: what the diagram should depict, in plain language. The downstream subagent renders it as inline SVG or HTML.

asset_path.description: v0.6.7: where the rendered video file should land. e.g. 'assets/s04-method-remotion.mp4'.

prompt_hint.description: v0.6.7: what the video should depict / what motion should it have.

layout_hint.description: A registered layout ID (e.g. 'S07-process-21x9') or template slug suggestion. Downstream skills must pick from their own registered set, not from this hint.
